top_signals.title: Mexico agrees to host Iranian World Cup squad as US-Iran tensions simmer
top_signals.summary: President Claudia Sheinbaum said her country had ‘no problem’ with request from Fifa
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Ghost CMS SQL injection flaw exploited in large-scale ClickFix campaign
top_signals.summary: A large-scale campaign is exploiting a critical SQL injection vulnerability (CVE-2026-26980) in Ghost CMS to inject malicious JavaScript code that triggers ClickFix attack flows. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
